body: This PR updates the leaderboard for diagnostics in pressure coordinates by throwing a warning if no diagnostics in pressure coordinates are found. Furthermore, this PR adds diagnostics in pressure coordinates for all configs in `amip_configs`, `longrun_configs`, and `nightly_configs`.
title: Update configs and leaderboard
